confidence_rationale: Video clearly contains educational/instructional content including expert interview with Prof. Hahnloser, classroom teaching demonstrations, simulation software display, and FLS equipment overviews. No actual task performance (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) is shown. This is curriculum material or marketing content, not a scoreable FLS assessment.
cannot_determine: Task ID - no FLS task is performed
Performance score - no performance data available
video_classification_notes: This video is an educational/instructional piece featuring expert commentary from Prof. Dieter Hahnloser, classroom demonstrations of surgical anatomy and simulation technology, and equipment overviews of FLS trainer systems. It does not contain any trainee or expert FLS task performance and therefore cannot be scored using the FLS rubric.

verbal_cues: Expert commentary from Chief Surgeon emphasizing educational value of simulation
